scripts.build: mkdir -p dist && cp index.html dist/ && cp announce.html dist/ && cp meeting.html dist/ && cp meeting.js dist/ && cp meeting.css dist/ && cp supply-chain.html dist/ && cp compliance-monitor.html dist/
scripts.start: npm run build && python3 -m http.server 5000 --directory dist
scripts.test: node --check supabase/functions/processEntryFee.js supabase/functions/processWithdrawal.js supabase/functions/createHandshakeSession.js supabase/functions/createStripeCheckout.js supabase/functions/stripeWebhook.js supabase/functions/aiAgentAnalyze.js supabase/functions/newsWebhook.js supabase/functions/generatePressRelease.js supabase/functions/syndicateAnnouncement.js supabase/functions/generateInstantRoom.js supabase/functions/documentBridge.js supabase/functions/aiSecretaryTools.js supabase/functions/aiComplianceLawyer.js supabase/functions/supplyChainCreateShipment.js supabase/functions/supplyChainUpdateStatus.js supabase/functions/supplyChainTrackMilestone.js supabase/functions/complianceRunWorkflow.js supabase/functions/complianceGetReport.js supabase/functions/meetingNegotiationState.js && node -e "import { readFileSync } from 'fs'; const sql = readFileSync('supabase/schema.sql', 'utf8'); if (!sql.includes('green_acc_deals')) throw new Error('Supabase schema missing green_acc_deals table'); if (!sql.includes('entry_fee_status')) throw new Error('Schema missing entry_fee_status field'); if (!sql.includes('deal_announcements')) throw new Error('Schema missing deal_announcements table'); if (!sql.includes('global_news')) throw new Error('Schema missing global_news table'); if (!sql.includes('instant_rooms')) throw new Error('Schema missing instant_rooms table'); if (!sql.includes('compliance_logs')) throw new Error('Schema missing compliance_logs table'); if (!sql.includes('supply_shipments')) throw new Error('Schema missing supply_shipments table'); if (!sql.includes('supply_milestones')) throw new Error('Schema missing supply_milestones table'); if (!sql.includes('compliance_runs')) throw new Error('Schema missing compliance_runs table'); if (!sql.includes('compliance_checks')) throw new Error('Schema missing compliance_checks table'); if (!sql.includes('meeting_negotiations')) throw new Error('Schema missing meeting_negotiations table'); if (!sql.includes('meeting_presence')) throw new Error('Schema missing meeting_presence table'); console.log('Validation passed');"
